docs.title: Geoff Schrecker's Website
docs.text:
This is where I will start building my own website. It's a bit of a project as I have just retired after spending my working life in UK General Practice and Clinical Informatics.

It will probably be a slow burner as I also intend to spend more time volunteering for the National Trust in the beautiful Peak District. So it might just be a place I stick the odd nice picture and some walks!

So far I have got it started, using Visual Studio Code and Material for MkDocs

For now, here's a lamb licking its nose:

docs.title: Grindleford to Froggatt Circular Walk
docs.text:
View route on OS Maps

This lovely short walk has the added benefit of starting and finishing by the excellent Grindleford Community Shop which also serves tea and locally homemade cakes!

docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
docs/
    index.md  # The documentation homepage.
    ...       # Other markdown pages, images and other files.
